title: phlomoides bungei
intro: Phlomoides bungei, also known as Mongolian sage or Chinese lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phlomoides bungei include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Phlomoides bungei is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
